---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format: html
toc: false
---

## Current Students

### PhD

- Théo Pargana (since October, 2024)
- Victor Hamelin (since March, 2026)

### Post-docs

- Eliott Dubois (since May, 2025)
- Baptiste Labonne (since August, 2025)

## Former Students

### PhD

- Franck Polewczyk
- Eliott Dubois

### Post-docs

- Marco Echeverria-Iriarte

### Internship

- Guillaume Ewald
- Jérôme Roche
- Eléonore Duval
- Nadjib Bennoura
- Rayane Mouhli
